team.name: Abdallah Ndwala
team.title: Founder & Director
team.description: Abdallah Ndwala is the Founder and Director of AgroInternational Pty Ltd, where he provides strategic leadership and oversees the company's operations, growth, and long-term development. He is responsible for establishing the company's vision, developing strategic partnerships, identifying new market opportunities, and ensuring the successful delivery of AgroInternational's objectives within the agricultural and international trade sectors. With over 16 years of senior management experience in the hospitality industry and more than 11 years of specialized experience in the coffee sector, Abdallah brings extensive expertise in business operations, customer relationship management, supply chain coordination, and agricultural product development. His strong background in hospitality and coffee production has enabled him to build valuable relationships across local and international markets, while driving operational excellence and sustainable business growth. Through his leadership, AgroInternational Pty Ltd continues to strengthen its position as a trusted partner in agricultural trade, connecting producers and buyers across global markets.

team.name: Jane Smith
team.title: Head of Operations
team.description: Jane oversees the end-to-end logistics and operations that ensure every shipment meets AgroInternational's quality standards and delivery commitments.

team.name: David Osei
team.title: Head of Sourcing
team.description: David manages our network of partner farms across Africa and Asia-Pacific, ensuring sustainable and ethical sourcing practices at every level.

team.name: Sarah Lee
team.title: Sales & Business Development
team.description: Sarah drives client acquisition and revenue growth, building long-term relationships with buyers and distributors across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.

team.name: Tom Kariuki
team.title: Quality & Compliance Manager
team.description: Tom ensures every product exported by AgroInternational meets rigorous international standards, managing certifications and regulatory compliance across all markets.
